offer: For property managers handling 10-50 units, inefficient tenant move-in/out processes cause delays in tenant transitions. We automate checklist generation instead of manual checklists and paper work orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar tools
Send direct messages to property managers with demo links
Join community forums for property management discussions
try_it: Let users try work order creation and invoice entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 sign-ups
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
